title: Ubiquiti USW-Aggregation - UniFi Switch Aggregation
category: Ubiquiti / LAN networks / Switches / UniFi Switches
description: UniFi Aggregation Switch is a managed Layer 2 switch with 8x 10G SFP+ ports. Featuring a compact 4.7" depth and fanless design , it supports high-bandwidth links to provide link aggregation for higher capacity and increased availability (8) 10G SFP+ Ports 160 Gbps switching capacity 1.3" Touchscreen with AR switch management Fanless, 4.7" depth compact enclosure 1U 19" Rackmountable (kit included) Managed by UniFi Network Controller - since version 5.43.13 or higher Device Power cord Rackmount ears
